channel.title: Comments on: Reset Core data database inside application

item.title: By: Anshul
item.dc:creator: Anshul
item.description: Hi, Shabib can we add parallax effect for pager in ios just like android ???
item.content:encoded: Hi, Shabib can we add parallax effect for pager in ios just like android ???

item.title: By: Shabib Hossain
item.dc:creator: Shabib Hossain
item.description:
In reply to <a href="./../comment-page-1/index.html#comment-2">Andre</a>.
you're most welcome :)

item.title: By: Andre
item.dc:creator: Andre
item.description: Shabib, I just wanted to thank you for this post! I lost hours trying to fix issues with my Core Data deletion and your code just made my nightmare end! Again, Thanks a lot :-)
item.content:encoded:
Shabib, I just wanted to thank you for this post!
I lost hours trying to fix issues with my Core Data deletion and your code just made my nightmare end!
Again, Thanks a lot 🙂
